arts.ttl: Sir Howard Bernstein tribute, Rodri interview, Gallagher feature
arts.sum: Formers Gunners striker Alan Smith provides us with his City Nightmare XI – the best Blues players he came up against in his illustrious career while our new Cover Stars feature looks back at the front of the City v Arsenal edition of the matchday programme from September 2009 – a game remembered for an iconic goal and celebration! Noel Gallagher also talks in the City v Arsenal matchday programme, giving his verdict on the new Definitely City kit that was worn for the first time in the Inter Milan UEFA Champions League game.

arts.ttl: Odegaard, Merino, Zinchenko - Arsenal injury news and return dates before Man City clash - football.london
arts.sum: The Arsenal captain missed the North London derby win after suffering an ankle injury during the international break. Merino has not yet played for Arsenal after suffering a shoulder fracture in his first training session with the club before the international break.

arts.ttl: How to watch Man City vs Arsenal - Kick-off time, TV channel and live stream details
arts.sum: A mouth-watering showdown between Premier League title rivals is on the horizon as Manchester City welcome Arsenal to the Etihad Stadium on Sunday afternoon.

arts.ttl: Arsenal give 'approval' for significant January transfer
arts.sum: One of Arsenal ’s crucial defensive players is reportedly ready to leave the club in January, with a host of top sides already queuing up to sign him. Gabriel Magalhaes, Ben White and William Saliba have played every minute in the Premier League so far, leading to players such as €45 million summer signing Riccardo Calafiori starting life at Arsenal as a bit-part option.

arts.ttl: Manchester City vs Arsenal combined XI ahead of Etihad clash
arts.sum: Manchester City and Arsenal go head-to-head in the Premier League on Sunday, a huge showdown between the top two teams from each of the last two campaigns. Arsenal are aiming to close the gap on the Premier League’s dominant force, having finished as narrow runners-up again last season. arts.ttl: 10 Best Away Kits in Arsenal History (Ranked)
arts.sum: This list contains the best Arsenal away kits in the history of the Premier League club, worn by club icons such as Bukayo Saka, Robert Pires and Edu.

arts.ttl: Manchester City vs Arsenal – Match Preview and team news
arts.sum: The Premier League’s most likely title contenders go to battle this weekend as Manchester City host Arsenal at the Etihad. Last season’s top two, the result could have a huge say on who lifts the trophy in May. arts.ttl: Man City vs Arsenal simulated on EA FC 25 to predict Premier League title clash
arts.sum: Manchester City host Arsenal at the Etihad Stadium this weekend, so we simulated the game on EA FC 25 to get a score prediction.

arts.ttl: 'A bit early': Former Tottenham coach says Arsenal duo can't be compared to Premier League legends just yet
arts.sum: "It's a bit early to compare them" 🤔

arts.ttl: We simulated Man City vs Arsenal on EA FC 25 to predict huge Premier League clash
arts.sum: Away to City is probably the biggest fixture in Arsenal's calendar, and after 12 Premier League losses in a row to Pep Guardiola's side, the Gunners got the better of their title rivals last season, taking four points from a possible six. We predict that City could line up in a 4-3-3 formation, with their starting XI as follows: Ederson; Lewis, Akanji, Dias, Gvardiol; Rodri, Gundogan, Foden; Silva, Haaland, Grealish.
